task: Launch-quality advanced task: Parametric Trigger Basis-Risk Backtest. Measure basis risk using only the embedded packet, propose a trigger adjustment, rank records by technical and economic impact, run the stated sensitivity check (sensitivity_shift_pct), and recommend one of: hold, release, retest, or mitigation. Separate safety/compliance blockers from economic optimizations (blockers override ROI). Mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Deliver parametric_basis_risk.ipynb and product_memo.md containing formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
